{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_1","type":"agent_message","text":"Operating mode set.

I’ll optimize for:
- Shippable, reliable increments
- Working code with meaningful tests
- Clear implementation notes for CEO review (what changed, why, risks, verification)
